fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 60 is inverted: clamping is applied when `clamp` is False and skipped when `clamp` is True. The `if not clamp:` should be `if clamp:`.

constraints.intent: When clamp is True (default), the branch body (clamping logic) should NOT execute; the condition `not clamp` should be False when clamp is True.
The then-branch (clamping) should only execute when clamp is False, so inside the branch `not clamp` must be True.

spec.expr: not clamp and min(y0, y1) <= y__2 <= max(y0, y1)

constraints.intent: y__2 is the clamped value and should only be computed (and be within [min(y0,y1), max(y0,y1)]) when clamp is False.

spec.expr: clamp == True or (min(y0, y1) <= y__3 <= max(y0, y1))

constraints.intent: When clamp is True, y__3 should equal the unclamped interpolation; when clamp is False, y__3 should be within the segment range.
